content.body:
Introduces cli/internal/cartographer/ with the core types (Extractor,
Source, Draft, ProvenanceMeta, Config, Result, Cartographer) and the
SHA256 file cache stored at .leo/cache/bootstrap/manifest.json.
Adds BootstrapConfig to cli/internal/config/config.go.
Adds github.com/smacker/go-tree-sitter as a dependency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(cartographer): add package skeleton, types, cache, and config schema
